title: D1: New CLI subcommand fabric plan-context-hint
description: Add new CLI subcommand `fabric plan-context-hint --paths <p1,p2,...> | --all`. Thin wrapper that imports planContext() from server. Outputs versioned JSON to stdout: `{version: 1, revision_hash, target_paths, narrow: [{id, type, maturity, summary}], broad_count}`. Stderr empty (renderer is hook's job — rc.6 consumers). In rc.5 only the CLI subcommand ships; rc.6 hooks (E1/E2) consume it. fabric-import skill ALSO consumes the JSON for default-broad pending creation. Register in packages/cli/src/commands/index.ts. Anchor: rc5-rc6-handoff.json#acceptance_criteria for D1.

files.change: Define command with --paths and --all flags; import planContext from server; print versioned JSON to stdout
Add zod schema for versioned hint output if not already covered by plan_context output schema

implementation: Read packages/cli/src/commands/scan.ts as command template (simplest existing command)
Call planContext with target_paths derived from --paths; if --all, pass empty/special marker for unfiltered
Shape output to {version: 1, revision_hash, target_paths, narrow: [...], broad_count}
Print JSON.stringify(output) to stdout; nothing to stderr on success
Register command in commands/index.ts alongside existing 4 (init/scan/serve/doctor)
Add zod output schema in shared if helpful for hook consumers
Smoke test: run `fabric plan-context-hint --all` on this repo, verify JSON well-formed

reference.examples: Mirror scan.ts argv parsing + serve.ts command export pattern

criteria: fabric plan-context-hint CLI subcommand registered in packages/cli/src/commands/index.ts
Outputs versioned JSON to stdout matching {version: 1, revision_hash, target_paths, narrow: [{id, type, maturity, summary}], broad_count}
fabric plan-context-hint --paths <p1,p2> reads relevance_paths filter and returns matched narrow set
fabric plan-context-hint --all returns full broad+narrow set (no path filter)
stderr remains empty on success; renderer is hook's job
Manual smoke test: command exits 0 and produces valid JSON on this repo

rationale.chosen_approach: Thin wrapper over planContext engine (same as fab_plan_context MCP adapter)
decision_factors: MCP and CLI are adapters for same engine (Q9 resolution)
Hook scripts run without node_modules; need self-contained CLI
rationale.tradeoffs: CLI process startup adds ~100ms overhead per hook invocation; acceptable for SessionStart/PreToolUse cadence

manual_checks: fabric plan-context-hint --all exits 0 with JSON stdout
fabric plan-context-hint --paths packages/server/src/services/plan-context.ts returns filtered narrow set

risks.description: planContext relies on TypeScript build artifacts not available in CLI process
risks.mitigation: Verify server is published as workspace dep; reuse import path from existing commands
risks.fallback: Spawn fabric serve in-process if direct import fails

key_functions.signature: export async function runPlanContextHint(opts: { paths?: string[]; all?: boolean }): Promise<void>
key_functions.purpose: CLI handler: invoke planContext, print versioned JSON

interfaces.name: PlanContextHintOutput
interfaces.definition: { version: 1; revision_hash: string; target_paths: string[]; narrow: Array<{id: string; type: string; maturity: string; summary: string}>; broad_count: number }
interfaces.purpose: Stable JSON contract for hook consumers
